revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 26 (old calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 26 (old calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月26日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]4年（[[1857年]]_月_日） - 下田奉行と[[タウンゼント・ハリス]]が[[下田条約]]を締結 * [[安政]]6年（[[1859年]]_月_日） - イギリス駐日総領事オールコックが着任
== 誕生日 == * [[享保]]17年（[[1732年]]_月_日） - [[中井履軒]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1817年]]） * [[安政]]6年（[[1859年]]_月_日） - [[柳原愛子]]、[[大正天皇]]の生母（+ [[1943年]]）
== 忌日 == * （[[649年]]_月_日） - [[太宗 (唐)|太宗]]、[[唐 (王朝)|唐]]の2代皇帝（* [[598年]]） * [[治承]]4年（[[1180年]]_月_日） - [[以仁王]]、[[後白河天皇]]の第二皇子・[[平氏]]討滅の謀主 （* [[1151年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月25日 (旧暦)|5月25日]] 翌日[[5月27日 (旧暦)|5月27日]] - 前月[[4月26日 (旧暦)|4月26日]] 翌月[[6月26日 (旧暦)|6月26日]] *新暦[[5月26日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月26日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1857年]][[5月4日]]） - 下田奉行と[[タウンゼント・ハリス]]が[[日米約定|下田条約]]を締結 * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[4月24日]]） - イギリス駐日総領事オールコックが着任
== 誕生日 == * [[享保]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1732年]][[5月3日]]） - [[中井履軒]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1817年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[4月24日]]） - [[柳原愛子]]、[[大正天皇]]の生母（+ [[1943年]]）
== 忌日 == * （[[ユリウス暦]][[649年]][[7月10日]]） - [[太宗 (唐)|太宗]]、[[唐]]の2代皇帝（* [[598年]]） * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[5月1日]]） - [[以仁王]]、[[後白河天皇]]の第二皇子・[[平氏]]討滅の謀主 （* [[1151年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}
[[ko:음력 5월 26일]]

== 忌日 == * [[貞観 (唐)|貞観]]23年（[[ユリウス暦]][[649年]][[7月10日]]） - [[太宗 (唐)|太宗]]{{要出典|date=2021-02}}、[[唐]]の2代皇帝（* [[598年]]） * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[6月20日]]） - [[以仁王]]、[[後白河天皇]]の第二皇子・[[平氏]]討滅の謀主 （* [[1151年]]） * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[6月20日]]） - [[源頼政]]、[[摂津源氏]]の武将 （* [[1104年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

[[sn:May 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[zh:五月廿六]] [[en:draft:May 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}}) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}}. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}}, assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}}) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}}, a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}}) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}}, a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}}, an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}}) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}}, a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}}) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}}, the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}}, (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}}, the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}}). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}}, the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}}). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}}, a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}}) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}}, a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}}) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}}, a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}}, an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}}) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}}, a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}}) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}}, the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}}, (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}}, the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}}). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}}, the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}}). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}}, a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

[[sn:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[zh:五月廿六]] [[en:draft:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平氏|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

[[sn:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[zh:五月廿六]] [[en:draft:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)== See Also ==

[[sn:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[zh:五月廿六]] [[en:draft:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857年}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|タウンゼント・ハリス}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832年}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834年}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104年}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817年}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825年}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598年}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December) == See Also ==

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[zh:五月廿六]] [[en:draft:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857th year }} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.

[[sn:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[zh:五月廿六]] [[en:draft:May 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857th year }} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857th year }} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year }} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year }} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year }} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year }} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year }} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直|12=draft}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦|12=draft}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain|12=draft}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子|12=draft}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō|12=draft}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=draft}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang|12=draft}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin|12=draft}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政|12=draft}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve|12=draft}} (if it is the final day of December)

== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=draft|12=draft}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang|12=draft|12=draft}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin|12=draft|12=draft}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|12=draft|12=draft}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=draft|12=draft}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直|12=draft|12=draft}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian == Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=draft|12=draft}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang|12=draft|12=draft}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin|12=draft|12=draft}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve|12=draft|12=draft}} (if it is the final day of December)

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|12=draft|12=draft}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=draft|12=draft}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Riken|ja|中井履軒|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1817|ja|1817th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1825|ja|1825th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 11|ja|7月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1832|ja|1832nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nakamura Masanao|ja|中村正直|12=draft|12=draft}} , an Enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1891|ja|1891st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 2|ja|7月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Inaba Masakuni|ja|稲葉正邦|12=draft|12=draft}} , a senior councilor ({{ill|rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and the 12th lord of the {{ill|Yodo Domain|ja|淀藩|lt=Yodo Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} in Yamashiro Province (died {{ill|1898|ja|1898th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yanagihara Aiko|ja|柳原愛子|12=draft|12=draft}} , the biological mother of Emperor {{ill|Taishō|ja|大正天皇|lt=Taishō|12=draft|12=draft}} , (died {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=draft|12=draft}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang|12=draft|12=draft}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin|12=draft|12=draft}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve|12=draft|12=draft}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=draft|12=draft}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|649|ja|649th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Taizong of Tang|ja|太宗 (唐)|lt=Taizong of Tang|12=draft|12=draft}} {{要出典|date=2021-02}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|598|ja|598th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Prince I'nin|ja|以仁王|lt=Prince I'nin|12=draft|12=draft}} , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1151|ja|1151st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimasa|ja|源頼政|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=draft|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1104|ja|1104th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|New Year's Eve|ja|大晦日|lt=New Year's Eve|12=draft|12=draft}} (if it is the final day of December)
