revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|" to "|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]]
{{translated page|ja|5月26日 (旧暦)|version=97894848|comment=Imported full ja history}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|qq=|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|qq=|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|qq=|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)

== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] {{wikidata link|Q839541}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|25|5|27|4|26|6|5|0526|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿六]] {{wikidata link|Q839541}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿六]][[zh:五月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839541]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 26|qq=May 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]] ) – The Shimoda Magistrate and {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} concluded the {{ill|Treaty of Shimoda|ja|日米約定|lt=Treaty of Shimoda|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Shimoda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日米追加条約|1=Treaty of Shimoda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21655758}} . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – The British Consul General in Japan, {{ill|Allcock|ja|オールコック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Allcock|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オルコック|1=Alcock|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2640367}} , assumed his post.
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]] ) – [[:en:Nakai Riken|Nakai Riken]] , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1817|1817]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:July 11|July 11]] ) – {{ill|Yorimizu Saburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|zh|儒生|lt=Confucian scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died [[:en:1859|1859]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]] ) – [[:en:Nakamura Masanao|Nakamura Masanao]] , an Enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1891|1891]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 2|July 2]] ) – [[:en:Inaba Masakuni|Inaba Masakuni]] , a senior councilor ([[:en:Rōjū|rōjū]] ) and the 12th lord of the [[:en:Yodo Domain|Yodo Domain]] in Yamashiro Province (died [[:en:1898|1898]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]] ) – [[:en:Yanagiwara Naruko|Yanagihara Aiko]] , the biological mother of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taishō|Taishō]] , (died [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōgan|ja|貞観 (唐)|lt=Jōgan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1042896}} 23rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Taizong of Tang|Taizong of Tang]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} , the 2nd emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born [[:en:598|598]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Prince Mochihito|Prince Mochihito]] , the second son of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the mastermind behind the eradication of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|lt=Taira clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (born [[:en:1151|1151]] ). * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yorimasa|Minamoto no Yorimasa]] , a military commander of the {{ill|Settsu Genji|ja|摂津源氏|lt=Settsu Genji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Genji|1=Settsu Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498578}} (born [[:en:1104|1104]] ).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Ōmisoka|New Year's Eve]] (if it is the final day of December)
